purpose: Installs a WH_KEYBOARD_LL hook that exits the app on physical keyboard input (ESC only, or any key), ignoring software-injected events.
called_by: MainForm.cs — constructed and installed/uninstalled around app lifetime
calls_out_to: user32!CallNextHookEx — passes events down the hook chain
Form.BeginInvoke — defers Close to avoid re-entrancy during hook callback
invariants: _hookProc delegate is kept alive as a field to prevent GC collection while the native hook holds a callback thunk pointer
Close is always posted via BeginInvoke from the hook callback, never called directly
gotchas: When GlobalKeyExit=false, the hook only closes the app if IsOurProcessForeground() — prevents exiting when running in the background
Hardware-emulating HID drivers may not set LLKHF_INJECTED; those inputs will be treated as physical and trigger exit
vkCode 0x00 and 0xFF are phantom key events sent by some devices — explicitly ignored
